title: Cynoglossospermum brachycentrum
taxonomy: Cynoglossospermum brachycentrum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes. It is a member of the genus Cynoglossospermum, which is a group of plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. The family Fabaceae is one of the largest and most diverse plant families, comprising over 19,000 known species. Cynoglossospermum brachycentrum is a climbing or twining plant that is native to Africa. Its classification reflects its close relationship with other legumes, which are known for their complex root nodules that form symbiotic relationships with nitrogen-fixing bacteria.
